text:

author: ABC News YouTube
text:
Spencer Pratt, Karen Bass among candidates in heated LA mayoral race & more trends | Searched
ABC News Live is breaking down the top stories trending today:
Instagram hack: Hackers trick Meta's AI support chatbot into giving them access to other people's accounts.
California primaries: All eyes are on the race for governor, while incumbent Karen Bass, reality TV star Spencer Pratt, and Councilmember Nithya Raman face off for Los Angeles mayor. 
A jury finds a store owner not guilty of murder in the 2023 shooting of 14-year-old Cyrus Carmack-Belton.
FDA recalls popular pizza brand over risk of salmonella contamination. 
AI heavyweight Anthropic officially files to go public in a potentially trillion-dollar stock market debut. 
 
Watch ‘Searched’ weeknights at 4:30 p.m. ET on @ABCNewsLive.

text:
Drag queen Pattie Gonia publicly rejects proposal from Patagonia on trademark lawsuit

ABC News legal analyst Brian Buckmire breaks down the dispute.

author: ABC News YouTube
text:
Solider surprises brother at his high school graduation after Iran service
A deployed soldier returned home to surprise her younger brother at his high school graduation in an emotional reunion caught on camera.
 
Wisconsin's Milwaukee Lutheran Middle and High School shared a video clip of the special moment between graduate Kalen Barksdale and his older sister Spc. Barksdale of the Wisconsin National Guard's 2-127th Infantry Battalion.
